ddls:
CREATE TABLE "yield_types" (
  "yield_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield type */,
  "yield_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the yield type (e.g., food, production) */,
  "icon_string" TEXT /* String representing the icon associated with the yield type */,
  "occupied_city_change" REAL /* Change in occupancy that affects yield, expressed as a float */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value associated with the yield type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the yield type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit used to measure the yield */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broader category to which the yield type belongs */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the yield type is critical for the organization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the yield type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "yield_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "yield_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the yield type related to this record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the yield was recorded */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific resource or farm within the city */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the yield measurement */,
  "yield_value" REAL /* Measured value of the yield on the specified date */,
  "yield_source" TEXT /* Source of the yield (e.g., farm, factory) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the yield record */,
  "is_estimated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the yield value is an estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_records_yield_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("yield_type_id") REFERENCES yield_types ("yield_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_records_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_yield_records_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource or farm */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the resource is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., farm, factory) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the resource in square meters */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
